policy_decision: Do not mark Overkill Factory as practical 10/10 until every blocking requirement has product-specific or provider-backed evidence.

requirements.next_action: Keep rerunning this proof when the related surface changes.
requirements.title: Hermes real worker orchestration
requirements.why_it_matters: The factory floor must be Hermes, not only local scripts or chat plans.

requirements.next_action: Keep rerunning this proof when the related surface changes.
requirements.title: Production-like Product Face proof
requirements.why_it_matters: A product is not complete until its real face works across states, mobile, a11y and performance boundaries.

requirements.next_action: Keep rerunning this proof when the related surface changes.
requirements.title: Factory code security scan
requirements.why_it_matters: The factory code that gates autonomous work must itself pass security review.

requirements.next_action: Keep rerunning this proof when the related surface changes.
requirements.title: Production Quasar Auditor code audit
requirements.why_it_matters: The public product-like audit is useful, but production approval needs the actual product program.

requirements.boundary: Run real CU profiling, SVM/client transactions and economic fuzz/property tests on production source.
requirements.next_action: Run real CU profiling, SVM/client transactions and economic fuzz/property tests on production source.
requirements.title: Production CU, SVM/client flow and economic safety
requirements.why_it_matters: Onchain code can pass unit tests and still fail through compute, transaction flow or economic edge cases.

requirements.boundary: Run managed Crabbox broker or Blacksmith Testbox with approved credentials and cleanup receipt.
requirements.next_action: Run managed Crabbox broker or Blacksmith Testbox with approved credentials and cleanup receipt.
requirements.title: Managed Crabbox/Testbox remote proof
requirements.why_it_matters: Static SSH proof is useful, but managed remote proof validates the intended provider-backed heavy gate.

requirements.boundary: Run product-specific R4 human gate, rollback proof, release smoke and monitoring evidence before any production claim.
requirements.next_action: Run product-specific R4 human gate, rollback proof, release smoke and monitoring evidence before any production claim.
requirements.title: Production release and human R4 gate
requirements.why_it_matters: Production release authority must be explicit, reviewed and reversible.

requirements.next_action: Keep rerunning this proof when the related surface changes.
requirements.title: Public repository supply-chain CI/SBOM
requirements.why_it_matters: An open factory must be reproducible and safe to accept contributions.

requirements.boundary: Rerun the same graph on a production product target and require every critical lane to be reusable_for_product=true before practical 10/10 completion.
requirements.next_action: Rerun the same graph on a production product target and require every critical lane to be reusable_for_product=true before practical 10/10 completion.
requirements.title: Full product-specific multi-specialist execution
requirements.why_it_matters: The goal is a factory that carries a real product through all required workers, not isolated prooflets.
